scripts.prebuild: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const v=execSync('git log --format=%ad-%h --date=format:%y%m%d -1').toString().trim().split('-');const ver=v[0]+'-'+v[1].slice(0,3);require('fs').writeFileSync('src/version.js','const APP_VERSION=\"V.'+ver+'\";export default APP_VERSION;\n')"
